TuckIn
TuckIn
01 · Recovery

How well did
you recover?

Hard day or easy one — TuckIn reads your Apple Watch activity and tells you exactly how well you recovered. Not a vague score. Hours, efficiency, and a straight answer.

02 · Your Schedule

Drag your
bedtime.

The circular arc shows your full sleep window at a glance. Drag either end to adjust — TuckIn recalculates everything as you move it. No forms, no number inputs.

03 · Tonight

Strain shifts
your bedtime.

Pushed hard today? TuckIn sees your Apple Watch data and shifts your bedtime earlier automatically. A light day means a lighter nudge. It adapts every single night.

04 · Performance

Sleep you can
measure.

One week of consistent sleep changes how you feel. TuckIn tracks it so you can see the pattern, catch the debt before it compounds, and actually build the habit.

05 · Reminder

On your phone.
On your wrist.

TuckIn nudges you at the right time tonight — not a fixed 10pm alarm. The reminder hits your lock screen and your Apple Watch, so you actually make it to bed when it matters.

to TuckIn.
